title: Bloo tree's modpack
description: A minimalist vanilla+ modpack to make the Minecraft experience a little better.
body:
Bloo tree's official modpack for playing minecraft.

With under 70 mods this modpack improves the minecraft experience just that little bit more to make an even more enjoyable experience as it aims to add all those little features you didn't know you needed.

This is a relatively lightweight performance and gameplay enhancing modpack that is designed to make the player's experience better. Featuring mods such as Sodium and Entity culling to improve the game's performance, Distant horizons and Better clouds to improve the visuals, and Item swapper and Lighty to make gameplay easier.

This modpack also features two resource packs from the vanilla tweaks website: https://vanillatweaks.net All credit for the resource packs go to them.
